_meta.description: Internal gains section registered input nodes. 4 inputs defining occupant activity level, lighting density, equipment efficiency spec, and elevator presence. Note: plug load density (d_65) and equipment density (d_67) are NOT inputs -- they are computed nodes derived from building type and reference standard.

instances.label: Occupant Activity Level
instances.note: Dropdown selection mapped to watts/person via ACTIVITY_WATTS lookup: Relaxed=96.71, Normal=117.23, Active=219.81, Hyperactive=424.95. Drives internal.occupants.wattsPerPerson (g_64).

instances.label: Lighting Density
instances.note: Lighting power density. Used in annual lighting energy: (density * floorArea * occupiedHours) / 1000.

instances.label: Equipment Efficiency Spec
instances.note: Dropdown for equipment efficiency level. Used with building type and elevator status to look up equipment density from EQUIPMENT_LOADS_TABLE.

instances.label: Elevator Presence
instances.note: Dropdown for elevator configuration. Used with building type and efficiency spec to look up equipment density from EQUIPMENT_LOADS_TABLE.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in InternalGainsNodes.js). Note: d_65 (plugLoadDensity) and d_67 (equipmentDensity) are computed nodes, not inputs.
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by internal gains computed nodes and section compliance ratios

preconditions.description: Must be one of: Relaxed, Normal, Active, Hyperactive

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of watts/person (g_64), annual occupant gains (h_64), heating/cooling gains (i_64, k_64), subtotals
Triggers recomputation of annual lighting energy (h_66), PLE subtotal (h_70), heating/cooling gains
Triggers recomputation of equipment density (d_67), annual equipment energy (h_67), PLE subtotal
behavior.note: C-classified. Equipment density is looked up from EQUIPMENT_LOADS_TABLE[buildingType][efficiencySpec][elevatorStatus]

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of equipment density (d_67), annual equipment energy (h_67), PLE subtotal

edgeCases.rationale: ACTIVITY_WATTS lookup returns default for unknown keys

edgeCases.condition: Unknown building type or efficiency spec combination
edgeCases.handling: Equipment density falls back to DEFAULT_EQUIPMENT_LOAD = 5.0 W/m2
edgeCases.rationale: EQUIPMENT_LOADS_TABLE may not have entry for all combinations
